_readme.description: Polls every 2h for READY start signals. Only fires email when at least one READY signal exists.
configure: Fetch Start Signals > body.postcode — your UK postcode
Fetch Start Signals > body.trade — trade type
Fetch Start Signals > body.radiusMiles — search radius
Fetch Start Signals > url — your deployed server URL
Send Alert Email — add SMTP credential, set fromEmail/toEmail
Swap Send Alert Email for Telegram/Slack node for push notifications
_readme.note: start-signals uses paid tier. Set FULL_ACCESS_TEST_MODE=true locally to test.
